task_completion.description: Analyze NACA 4412 airfoil with specified parameters
task_completion.visual_evidence: QBlade XFoil Direct Analysis module showing NACA 4412 loaded, Reynolds number set to 500,000, Ncrit set to 9, and a 360-degree polar extrapolation graph visible.
QBlade Rotor Blade Design module showing a 3-bladed configuration, Hub radius set to 0.2m, and Rotor radius set to 2.0m.

task_completion.description: Apply linear taper and twist distributions
task_completion.visual_evidence: QBlade Rotor Blade Design module showing straight-line (linear) graphs or table values for both Chord (taper) and Twist distributions from the hub to the tip.
QBlade Rotor BEM Simulation module showing a Power Coefficient (Cp) vs Tip Speed Ratio (TSR) graph, with the peak of the curve occurring between TSR 6.8 and 7.2.

task_completion.description: Save project and export required files
task_completion.visual_evidence: File manager or terminal window showing the existence of 'tsr7_rotor.wpa' in '~/Documents/projects/', and 'tsr7_geometry.txt' and 'tsr7_bem_results.txt' in '~/Documents/'.

integrity.description: Agent used the QBlade GUI for design and simulation
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show active interaction with the QBlade v0.96.2 graphical interface, not just terminal commands or text editors.

integrity.description: Simulation results are genuinely generated by QBlade
integrity.visual_evidence: The Cp vs TSR graph in QBlade looks like a standard aerodynamic curve peaking below the Betz limit of 0.593, rather than manually drawn or manipulated.

integrity.description: Agent did not manually fake the output files
integrity.visual_evidence: No screenshots showing the agent manually typing the contents of 'tsr7_geometry.txt' or 'tsr7_bem_results.txt' in a text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: NACA 4412 is a standard airfoil. Re=500,000 and Ncrit=9 are standard parameters. The theoretical maximum power coefficient (Betz limit) is 0.593, so the peak Cp in the simulation must be below this value. The optimal TSR for this 3-bladed rotor is targeted at 7.0 (±0.2). QBlade v0.96.2 is the expected software.
